expectations.text: Output contains a Decomposition Summary section
expectations.evidence: Full Decomposition Summary with Goal, Likely Affected Areas (all layers listed), Main Workstreams (11 workstreams), Highest-Risk Changes, Assumptions, Open Questions, Execution Waves

expectations.text: Tasks are organized into execution waves
expectations.evidence: 6 execution waves with explicit dependency chains and parallelization notes per wave

expectations.text: Every task card includes required fields
expectations.evidence: All 15 cards include the full template: Goal, Context Anchor, In Scope, Non-Goals, Dependencies, Parallelizable, Can Land Independently, Change Type, Risk Level, Compatibility (API/Data/Rollout), Acceptance Criteria, Verification Prerequisites, Verification Commands, Constraints, Rollout/Rollback Notes, Notes/Risks, Scope Check

expectations.text: Includes discovery cards to audit tables, endpoints, and/or jobs
expectations.evidence: TASK-01 is a dedicated discovery card to audit all 40 tables, 200 endpoints, 15 job types, ORM layer, auth model, and Redis patterns. Produces concrete inventory.
TASK-07 implements tenant-scoped DAL enforcement with fail-closed security model (missing tenant = error). RLS mentioned as option. TASK-12 enforces NOT NULL + RLS policies.

expectations.text: Covers database, API, cache (Redis), jobs (Celery), and frontend
expectations.evidence: Database: TASK-04/06/11/12. API: TASK-03/09. Redis: TASK-05. Celery: TASK-08. Frontend: TASK-10. All layers explicitly covered with dedicated cards.

expectations.text: Identifies this as high-risk with appropriate rollback/rollout notes
expectations.evidence: Highest-Risk Changes section identifies cross-tenant leakage, cache poisoning, performance regression. Individual cards include rollback notes. Schema migration split across 3 risk boundaries (nullable add, backfill, NOT NULL enforcement).

expectations.text: Output includes a Follow-up Tasks section
expectations.evidence: 13 follow-up tasks: admin UI, rate limiting, billing integration, compliance tooling, etc.
